name: Claude-Mem
description: A persistent memory plugin for Claude Code that automatically captures coding operations and provides AI-compressed context injection across sessions, achieving 95% token cost reduction. Uses SQLite with Chroma vector database for semantic memory retrieval.

name: Xcode 26.3 with Agentic Coding
description: Apple's major Xcode update introducing native integration of AI coding agents (OpenAI Codex and Anthropic Claude) with project context access and MCP (Model Context Protocol) support. Agents can access project context, modify files, and maintain workspace awareness across sessions.

name: Straion
description: An enterprise-focused AI coding agent that solves the babysitting problem by providing organizational context and rules automatically. Reached #2 on Product Hunt with 349 upvotes. Features persistent workspace context and memory for enterprise environments.

name: Mastra Code
description: An AI programming agent featuring observational memory and support for long-term coding sessions. Provides precise context management, rapid application building, and data compression for extended development work with workspace memory capabilities.

name: GLM-5 with OpenClaw
description: An open-source AI coding agent framework featuring built-in LanceDB memory plugin for persistent workspace memory, autonomous coding capabilities, and Terminal Bench 2.0 score of 56.2 (open-source SOTA). Features persistent memory across coding sessions with vector database storage.
